title: Cruvit Growth Outcome Suitability Profile Contract
description: GOS-1 biological outcome profile contract. Describes source-backed biological requirements and evidence references for six growth outcomes. Does NOT store computed user-location scores, evaluator levels, goalFit, recommendedUse, or overallConclusion. User goals (ornamental foliage, flowering display, edible harvest, reliable household yield, experimental growing, protected growing, low maintenance, container growing) belong to a future evaluator interpretation layer and must not rewrite the six biological estimates. Plants without a Growth Outcome profile remain valid and continue to use Climate Suitability Engine v1b unchanged. legacyClimateTraitsCoverage=environment_only means existing climateTraits describe coarse environment fit only and must never be treated as complete Growth Outcome evidence.

schemaVersion.description: Contract schema major version. Increment only with breaking shape changes.

engineContractVersion.description: Semantic version of the evaluator contract this profile data is authored against. Profiles do not embed evaluator outputs.

dataVersion.description: Semantic version of the profile dataset content in this file.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this profile document as a whole.

profiles.description: Zero or more Growth Outcome profiles. Empty array is valid. Absence of a plant from this list means no GOS profile yet.

IsoDate.description: Calendar date as YYYY-MM-DD. Calendar validity is enforced by the contract validator.

PlantId.description: Optional opaque plantId from the canonical identity registry. Advisory linkage only; not required for GOS-1.

EvidenceId.description: Stable non-empty evidence identifier referencing a record in the evidence dataset.

OutcomeName.description: Exact six biological outcome names. fruitSet and fruitRipeningOrYield remain distinct.

DataStatus.description: Evidence completeness for one outcome. unknown is first-class and must not inherit earlier-stage support.

Confidence.description: Editorial/evidence confidence for one outcome. Separate from suitability scores. high is invalid when dataStatus is unknown.

ApplicabilityScope.description: Applicability may be unknown. Unknown does not imply universal applicability.

status.description: unknown = not yet constrained; specified = listed values apply; not_applicable = dimension does not apply.

values.description: When status=specified, non-empty controlled tokens (regions, cultivars, hemispheres, environments).

FactorCategory.description: Governed factor categories for structured requirement rules. Extensible only by deliberate schema revision.

RequirementRule.description: Structured biological requirement rule. No botanical thresholds are authored in GOS-1; this defines shape only.

factorKey.description: Stable factor key within the factorCategory namespace.

value.description: Scalar comparison value when applicable. Type depends on factor; may be number, string, or boolean.

unit.description: Unit when quantitative (e.g. celsius, chill_hours, days). Omit when not applicable.

OutcomeBlock.description: One biological outcome. Later stages must not inherit support from earlier stages. supported requires non-empty evidenceRefs. conflicting requires conflictReason and/or conflictEvidenceRefs. high confidence is invalid when dataStatus is unknown. Computed fields (score, level, goalFit, recommendedUse, overallConclusion, suitabilityScore) are forbidden.

explicitUnknowns.description: Explicit unknown dimensions for this outcome. Required non-empty when dataStatus is unknown.

evidenceRefs.description: Evidence IDs for THIS outcome only. Survival evidence must not satisfy flowering/fruit/reliability requirements.

conflictReason.description: Required when dataStatus=conflicting unless conflictEvidenceRefs is non-empty.

conflictEvidenceRefs.description: Evidence IDs that conflict for this outcome. Preserved rather than overwritten.

GrowthOutcomeProfile.description: Biological Growth Outcome profile for one canonical plant identity. No computed evaluator outputs. No user-goal storage. No mango or other botanical thresholds in GOS-1.

profileVersion.description: Semantic version of this profile's authored content.

scientificName.description: Scientific name string for human review and linkage. Identity resolution remains separately governed.

legacyClimateTraitsCoverage.description: none = no reliance on legacy climateTraits. environment_only = legacy climateTraits may describe coarse environment fit only and MUST NOT be treated as complete Growth Outcome evidence for flowering, fruit set, ripening, or reliability.

evidenceRefs.description: Union of evidence IDs referenced by this profile. Per-outcome evidenceRefs remain authoritative for stage support.
